tech_news.description: Jared Palmer had joined Xbox from Microsoft's CoreAI division

tech_news.title: dBrand Announces 9 Steam Machine Skins That Are Now Available - Steam Deck HQ
tech_news.description: dBrand has announced 9 new skins for the Steam Machine, and some of them look incredible.

tech_news.title: Anyone in Bluetooth Range Can Unlock Cars, Kill Engines Through Alarms Owners May Never Have Paid For - The Drive
tech_news.description: A dealer-installed alarm in two million cars is vulnerable to hackers. Worse yet, owners may not even know their car has one.

tech_news.title: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy - The Verge
tech_news.description: Best Buy is discounting almost every Kindle. We also found deals on the Google Pixel Watch 2, Pixel 7, the Ring Battery Doorbell 2K, and Indoor Cam Plus.

tech_news.title: Steam Deck sales are losing steam since May's price hike - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Analysis of bestseller charts shows an 80 percent dip from 2025's sales rate.

tech_news.title: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads - The Verge
tech_news.description: Apple is planning to launch a new Apple Upgrade program for leasing iPhones, iPads, Mac, and Apple Watches, while discontinuing the current iPhone Upgrade Program.

tech_news.title: Darkest Dungeon is getting its first dollop of DLC in several years, as the gloomy old RPG celebrates its 10th birthday - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Red Hook Studios has surprised fans of the first Darkest Dungeon with a new DLC pack that will add two heroes from the sequel and more.
